actionable_lessons: Treat late, expensive entries as potentially toxic flow rather than 'high confidence'.
Use this lens when deciding whether to relax price and timing guards.
anti_patterns: A toxicity model does not automatically produce profitable trades.
Do not treat a high win rate at bad prices as a safe live edge.
body:
Actionable lessons:
- Treat late, expensive entries as potentially toxic flow rather than 'high confidence'.
- Use this lens when deciding whether to relax price and timing guards.

What it does not justify:
- A toxicity model does not automatically produce profitable trades.
- Do not treat a high win rate at bad prices as a safe live edge.
citation: Flow Toxicity and Liquidity in a High-frequency World (https://academic.oup.com/rfs/article/25/5/1457/1569929)
summary: Paper on adverse selection, toxic order flow, and liquidity quality in high-frequency markets.
title: Flow Toxicity and Liquidity in a High-frequency World
